scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @talenthub/api" "npm run dev -w @talenthub/web"
scripts.railway:build:api: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run prisma:generate -w @talenthub/api && npm run build -w @talenthub/api
scripts.railway:start:api: npm run prisma:db:push -w @talenthub/api && npm run start:prod -w @talenthub/api
scripts.railway:build:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w @talenthub/web
